title: Add Account-Level Permissions for using @ mentions, specifically '@everyoneonthisboard'.
excerpt: The @ mention ‘@everyoneonthisboard’ causes so much confusion and frustration, as folks use this on accident multiple times per week and don’t realize the impact of hundreds of unnecessary emails being sent out to people…

posts.author: natalie.walker (Natalie Walker)
posts.cookedHtml: The @ mention ‘@everyoneonthisboard’ causes so much confusion and frustration, as folks use this on accident multiple times per week and don’t realize the impact of hundreds of unnecessary emails being sent out to people who aren’t subscribed to the item. At the Account or Board level, these permissions should be in place to allow only certain folks or no folks to use this @mention for this reason. Please vote!!
